task_completion.description: Open the specified synthetic CT scan in the DICOM viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM viewer (e.g., Weasis) is open and displays the file 'CT_slice_001.dcm' in its interface.

task_completion.description: Adjust the window and level settings to visualize the background gradient and central circular structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image in the viewport is no longer washed out; a distinct central circular structure and a background gradient are clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Measure the horizontal and vertical diameters of the central circle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two measurement lines (one horizontal, one vertical) are drawn across the central circular structure in the viewport, displaying length values (expected to be around 128.0 pixels).

task_completion.description: Export the viewport showing the visible structure and measurements to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, file manager, or terminal shows the image 'aspect_ratio_view.jpg' being saved or existing in '~/DICOM/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Create a text report containing the Horizontal Length, Vertical Length, and calculated Aspect Ratio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the contents of 'aspect_ratio_report.txt' in '~/DICOM/exports/', showing the horizontal length, vertical length, and the aspect ratio (Vertical / Horizontal, expected to be ~1.0).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the DICOM viewer GUI to adjust settings and measure, rather than using scripts or terminal commands to bypass the viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DICOM viewer interface with active measurement tools and adjusted image contrast.

integrity.description: Verify the values in the report match the actual measurements taken in the viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The horizontal and vertical lengths written in the text report exactly match the numbers displayed on the measurement lines in the DICOM viewer viewport.

integrity.description: Verify the exported image is a genuine capture of the viewport.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported 'aspect_ratio_view.jpg' matches the visual state of the DICOM viewer's viewport, including the specific placement and color of the measurement lines.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected horizontal and vertical diameters of the central circle are exactly 128.0 pixels. The report must be saved to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/aspect_ratio_report.txt and the viewport image exported to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/aspect_ratio_view.jpg.
